title: allionia greggii
intro: Allionia greggii, also known as Gregg's allionia, is a perennial plant in the family Nyctaginaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Allionia greggii include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice for herbal use.
